subject: [COMMON][OTHERS] Fix dependency conditions
commit_message:
[COMMON][OTHERS] Fix dependency conditions

In case of local DB the "init" dependency is activated
as the "not" condition is not working

Issue-ID: OOM-3152

Signed-off-by: Andreas Geissler <andreas-geissler@telekom.de>
Change-Id: I27dba69a644bbcc2b61245c22784976ba7c66173

entries.message:

Gitlab controller: Deployment put on queue, number 1 on the queue.

Patch Set 1: Verified-1

Build Failed 

https://jenkins.onap.org/job/oom-master-commit-lint/6550/ : FAILURE

The Commit title must follow this pattern "[WHAT] A title"

WHAT can be a component name (AAI for example), DOC for documentation, COMMON for common, ...

The title must start with a capital letter (A in the example) and a space must be set between the end of the topic and the actual title: "] A title" ( https://jenkins.onap.org/job/oom-master-commit-lint/6550/ )
